title: Uber Lays Off 10 Percent Of Its Customer Service Team In Favor Of Using AI
excerpt: Uber's global customer service network has been hit by layoffs in favor of AI.
content_html:
It also walked back its remote work policy.

Charles-McClintock Wilson/Shutterstock

Uber has laid off 10 percent of its customer service team, and according to Bloomberg, the company cited AI as the reason for the job cuts. An Uber spokesperson told the publication that the cuts were done "to simplify operations, strengthen in-person collaboration and continue to embrace AI." The division affected by the layoffs is called Community Operations, Uber's global customer support network across its different businesses and across languages. It has teams for specific regions and countries that work closely with local businesses and drivers.

"Our organization has become too complex and siloed," Megha Yethadka, Uber's vice president of global community operations, reportedly told her team in a memo. Yethadka added that the department "has made some strides" in using AI, but to be able to scale its use, it needs an "effective organization to layer AI on."

Bloomberg didn't say what Uber will use generative AI for within the organization that makes it necessary to lay off people. However, AI agents for customer service have made great improvements lately. Voice AI has become better and better at being able to naturally communicate with customers and understand and respond to their needs and complaints. In addition to announcing job cuts, Uber also reportedly asked people working for the team remotely to relocate to hub offices as part of its return-to-office mandate. It previously said that it was slowing hiring due to AI use, as well.

Uber joins the growing list of companies that point to AI as the reason for layoffs. In June, Oracle cut 21,000 roles worldwide, citing the "adoption and deployment of AI technologies." Snap laid off around 1,000 workers in April, seemingly to replace them with AI. Meta also recently reduced its workforce by 10 percent, a move that affected 8,000 jobs, and then moved 7,000 personnel to new organizations focused on building AI tools.

sentences.zh: 据报道，Uber 全球社区运营副总裁梅加·耶塔德卡 (Megha Yethadka) 在一份备忘录中对她的团队表示：“我们的组织变得过于复杂和孤立。”

sentences.en: Yethadka added that the department "has made some strides" in using AI, but to be able to scale its use, it needs an "effective organization to layer AI on."
sentences.zh: Yethadka 补充说，该部门在使用人工智能方面“已经取得了一些进展”，但为了能够扩大其使用范围，它需要一个“有效的组织来分层人工智能”。

It previously said that it was slowing hiring due to AI use, as well.

sentences.zh: 彭博社没有透露 Uber 将在组织内部使用生成式人工智能来做什么，从而导致有必要裁员。

sentences.en: However, AI agents for customer service have made great improvements lately.
sentences.zh: 然而，用于客户服务的人工智能代理最近取得了很大的进步。

sentences.en: Voice AI has become better and better at being able to naturally communicate with customers and understand and respond to their needs and complaints.
sentences.zh: 语音人工智能已经越来越擅长与客户自然地沟通，理解并响应他们的需求和投诉。

sentences.en: In addition to announcing job cuts, Uber also reportedly asked people working for the team remotely to relocate to hub offices as part of its return-to-office mandate.
sentences.zh: 据报道，除了宣布裁员之外，Uber 还要求团队远程工作人员搬到中心办公室，作为重返办公室任务的一部分。

sentences.en: It previously said that it was slowing hiring due to AI use, as well.
sentences.zh: 该公司此前曾表示，由于人工智能的使用，它正在放慢招聘速度。

blocks.html_en: Uber joins the growing list of companies that point to AI as the reason for layoffs. In June, Oracle cut 21,000 roles worldwide, citing the "adoption and deployment of AI technologies." Snap laid off around 1,000 workers in April, seemingly to replace them with AI. Meta also recently reduced its workforce by 10 percent, a move that affected 8,000 jobs, and then moved 7,000 personnel to new organizations focused on building AI tools.

sentences.en: Uber joins the growing list of companies that point to AI as the reason for layoffs.
sentences.zh: 越来越多的公司将人工智能作为裁员的原因，Uber 也加入其中。

sentences.en: In June, Oracle cut 21,000 roles worldwide, citing the "adoption and deployment of AI technologies."
sentences.zh: 6 月，甲骨文在全球范围内裁员 21,000 人，理由是“人工智能技术的采用和部署”。

sentences.en: Snap laid off around 1,000 workers in April, seemingly to replace them with AI.
sentences.zh: Snap 在 4 月份解雇了大约 1,000 名员工，似乎是用人工智能取代他们。

sentences.en: Meta also recently reduced its workforce by 10 percent, a move that affected 8,000 jobs, and then moved 7,000 personnel to new organizations focused on building AI tools.
sentences.zh: Meta 最近还裁减了 10% 的员工，此举影响了 8,000 个工作岗位，然后将 7,000 名员工转移到专注于构建 AI 工具的新组织。

content_html_zh:
它还取消了远程工作政策。

查尔斯·麦克林托克·威尔逊/Shutterstock

Uber 已经解雇了 10% 的客户服务团队，据彭博社报道，该公司将人工智能作为裁员的原因。 Uber 发言人告诉该刊物，裁员是“为了简化运营、加强面对面协作并继续拥抱人工智能”。 受裁员影响的部门称为社区运营部门，这是 Uber 跨不同业务、跨语言的全球客户支持网络。 它拥有针对特定地区和国家的团队，与当地企业和司机密切合作。

据报道，Uber 全球社区运营副总裁梅加·耶塔德卡 (Megha Yethadka) 在一份备忘录中对她的团队表示：“我们的组织变得过于复杂和孤立。” Yethadka 补充说，该部门在使用人工智能方面“已经取得了一些进展”，但为了能够扩大其使用范围，它需要一个“有效的组织来分层人工智能”。

彭博社没有透露 Uber 将在组织内部使用生成式人工智能来做什么，从而导致有必要裁员。 然而，用于客户服务的人工智能代理最近取得了很大的进步。 语音人工智能已经越来越擅长与客户自然地沟通，理解并响应他们的需求和投诉。 据报道，除了宣布裁员之外，Uber 还要求团队远程工作人员搬到中心办公室，作为重返办公室任务的一部分。 该公司此前曾表示，由于人工智能的使用，它正在放慢招聘速度。

越来越多的公司将人工智能作为裁员的原因，Uber 也加入其中。 6 月，甲骨文在全球范围内裁员 21,000 人，理由是“人工智能技术的采用和部署”。 Snap 在 4 月份解雇了大约 1,000 名员工，似乎是用人工智能取代他们。 Meta 最近还裁减了 10% 的员工，此举影响了 8,000 个工作岗位，然后将 7,000 名员工转移到专注于构建 AI 工具的新组织。
